get.description:
Serve NOS installer binary.

Experimental: this endpoint is part of an experimental feature set
and may change in future releases.

This endpoint:
- Receives ONIE headers from the switch
- Checks if an installer is assigned to the switch
- If assigned, streams the installer binary to the switch

keyring_filename.title: Keyring Filename
keyring_filename.description: File path to keyring to use for verifying signatures of the boot sources.

keyring_data.title: Keyring Data
keyring_data.description: Base64-encoded keyring data used for signature verification. Optional alternative to providing a keyring file path.

skip_keyring_verification.title: Skip Keyring Verification
skip_keyring_verification.description: If true, keyring signature verification will be skipped.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Priority value. Higher values mean higher priority. Must be non-negative.

url.title: Url
url.description: URL of SimpleStreams server providing boot source information.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether to enable downloads from this source or not.

message.title: Message
message.description: The message for this notification. May contain basic HTML,such as formatting. This string will be sanitised before display sothat it doesn't break MAAS HTML.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: User ID this notification is intended for.By default it will not be targeted to any individual user.

for_users.title: For Users
for_users.description: True to notify all users,defaults to false, i.e. not targeted to all users.

for_admins.title: For Admins
for_admins.description: True to notify all admins,defaults to false, i.e. not targeted to all admins.

context.title: Context
context.description: Optional JSON context. The root object *must* be an object(i.e. a mapping). The values herein can be referenced by ``message``with Python's 'format' (not %) codes.

dismissable.title: Dismissable
dismissable.description: Wheter this notification can be dismissed or not. Defaults to True.

name.title: Name
name.description: A unique, human-readable name identifying the OIDC provider.

client_id.title: Client Id
client_id.description: The client ID issued by the OIDC provider to identify your application.

client_secret.title: Client Secret
client_secret.description: The client secret issued by the OIDC provider, used to authenticate your application securely.

issuer_url.title: Issuer Url
issuer_url.description: The base URL of the OIDC provider’s authorization server.

redirect_uri.title: Redirect Uri
redirect_uri.description: The callback URL in your application where the OIDC provider will redirect users after successful authentication.

token_type.description: The type of access tokens issued by the OIDC provider (e.g., JWT or opaque).

vendor.description: The OIDC provider vendor. Select from predefined vendors or use 'Generic' for other providers.

scopes.title: Scopes
scopes.description: A space-separated list of OIDC scopes defining the information requested from the provider.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Specifies whether this provider should be enabled for user authentication.

name.title: Name
name.description: The unique name of the entity.

cidr.title: Cidr
cidr.description: The network CIDR for this subnet.

rdns_mode.description: How reverse DNS is handled for this subnet. One of:- ``0`` Disabled: No reverse zone is created.- ``1`` Enabled: Generate reverse zone.- ``2`` RFC2317: Extends '1' to create the necessary parent zone with the appropriate CNAME resource records for the network, if the network is small enough to require the support described in RFC2317.

gateway_ip.title: Gateway Ip
gateway_ip.description: The gateway IP for this subnet.

dns_servers.title: Dns Servers
dns_servers.description: List of DNS servers for the subnet.

allow_dns.title: Allow Dns
allow_dns.description: Configure MAAS DNS to allow DNS resolution in this subnet.

allow_proxy.title: Allow Proxy
allow_proxy.description: Configure maas-proxy to allow requests from this subnet.

active_discovery.title: Active Discovery
active_discovery.description: Whether to allow active discovery in the subnet.

managed.title: Managed
managed.description: Whether this subnet is managed by MAAS or not.

disabled_boot_architectures.title: Disabled Boot Architectures
disabled_boot_architectures.description: List of disabled boot architectures for this subnet.

image.title: Image
image.description: Boot resource name for the NOS to install on the switch. Supports full format (e.g., 'onie/mellanox-3.8.0') or short format for ONIE images (e.g., 'mellanox-3.8.0').

Represents a network switch device with its target image configuration.

name.title: Name
name.description: The new tag name. Because the name will be used in urls, it should be short.

definition.title: Definition
definition.description: An XPATH query that is evaluated againstthe hardware_details stored for all nodes (i.e. the output of ``lshw -xml``).

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: A description of what fhe tag will be used for in natural language.

kernel_opts.title: Kernel Opts
kernel_opts.description: Nodes associated with this tag will add this string to their kernel options when booting. The value overrides the global ``kernel_opts`` setting. If more than one tag is associated with a node, command line will be concatenated from all associated tags, in alphabetic tag name order.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description: Content for a response returning a JWT and a refresh token.

configurations.title: Configurations
configurations.description: List of configurations to be updated.

name.title: Name
name.description: The unique name of the entity.

vid.title: Vid
vid.description: The VLAN ID of the VLAN. Valid values are within the range [0, 4094].

mtu.title: Mtu
mtu.description: The MTU to use on the VLAN. Valid values are within the range [552, 65535].

space_id.title: Space Id
space_id.description: The space this VLAN should be placed in. If not specified, the VLAN will be placed in the 'undefined' space.

name.title: Name
name.description: The unique name of the entity.

vid.title: Vid
vid.description: The VLAN ID of the VLAN. Valid values are within the range [0, 4094].

mtu.title: Mtu
mtu.description: The MTU to use on the VLAN. Valid values are within the range [552, 65535].

space_id.title: Space Id
space_id.description: The space this VLAN should be placed in. If not specified, the VLAN will be placed in the 'undefined' space.

dhcp_on.title: Dhcp On
dhcp_on.description: Whether or not DHCP should be managed on the VLAN.

primary_rack_id.title: Primary Rack Id
primary_rack_id.description: The primary rack controller ID managing the VLAN.

secondary_rack_id.title: Secondary Rack Id
secondary_rack_id.description: The secondary rack controller ID managing the VLAN

relay_vlan_id.title: Relay Vlan Id
relay_vlan_id.description: Relay VLAN ID. Only set when this VLAN will be using a DHCP relay to forward DHCP requests to another VLAN that MAAS is managing. MAAS will not run the DHCP relay itself, it must be configured to proxy reqests to the primary and/or secondary rack controller interfaces for the VLAN specified in this field.
